title: Soft Bits
body:
# Overview
**A 16x simplistic, plastic-like resourcepack, originally inspired by the likes of Mad Pixels, Dandelion and the Plastic resourcepack found in Minecraft Bedrock.**

Currently supports versions ranging from 1.8.x to 1.21.x

Original publish site can be found **[HERE](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/soft-bits-simple-and-soft/).**
#
